vocab.search: Implement using Next.js 15 Server Actions with useActionState hook. For client-side filtering, use useDeferredValue for performance.
vocab.loading: Use React Suspense boundaries with loading.tsx files in App Router. For API-dependent data, implement streaming with Suspense.
vocab.authentication: Implement using NextAuth v5 (Auth.js). Session management via server-side cookies.
vocab.database: Use Prisma ORM with connection pooling via PgBouncer for serverless environments.
vocab.api: Create Route Handlers in /app/api/[route]/route.ts. Support GET, POST, PUT, DELETE. Use Edge Runtime for latency-sensitive endpoints.
